items.title: Multilingual Document AI
items.description: Production-grade OCR/ICR platform for structured data extraction from scanned documents, combining object detection, text recognition, NER, and layout-aware processing.

items.title: Invoice & Payment Automation
items.description: End-to-end invoice processing pipelines for field extraction, normalization, and validation, integrated with downstream ERP and RPA workflows.

items.title: Legal Document Intelligence
items.description: LLM-powered contract analysis system for clause extraction, obligation identification, and risk assessment with evidence-based outputs.

items.title: Healthcare GenAI Assistant
items.description: Retrieval-augmented generation system for clinical and policy document QA, incorporating guardrails, compliance controls, and domain-specific knowledge retrieval.

items.title: AI Runtime Optimization Engine
items.description: Inference optimization framework for document AI pipelines using batching, mixed precision, and I/O tuning to improve performance and reduce latency.

items.title: Low-Code GenAI Platform
items.description: Enterprise-grade low-code platform enabling rapid development of AI applications with agent workflows, connectors, guardrails, and prompt management.
